description.description: The detailed description of the ad.

price.description: The price of the item or service.

contact.description: The contact information for the poster.

status.description: The current status of the ad.

posted_at.description: The timestamp when the ad was posted.

expires_at.description: The timestamp when the ad expires.

enquiry_count.description: The number of enquiries received for this ad.

featured.description: Whether the ad is featured and pinned to the top.

uid.description: The UID of the user who posted the ad.

enquiry.title: Enquiry
enquiry.description: An enquiry sent to an ad poster.

ad_id.description: The ID of the ad being enquired about.

sent_at.description: The timestamp when the enquiry was sent.

/ads/{adId}/enquiries/{enquiryId}.description: Subcollection of enquiries for a specific ad.
